lines.hearsay: Sacks were going onto a cart at {place} since first light.
lines.gossip: {A} loaded {B}'s grain at {place} without being asked twice, which at the mill is worth more than the rate — {B} has stopped counting the sacks {A} carries, and {B} counts everything.
lines.report: {A} took {B}'s grain onto the cart at {place} against the day's manifest, slot {slot}.
